summary:
AVIATION SECURITY AND ATLANTA AIRPORT: Brandon discusses a recent news report about a loaded gun magazine found on a Frontier flight preparing to depart from the Atlanta airport. Brandon notes that Atlanta was previously highlighted to him as a specific hotspot requiring prayer to prevent a catastrophic event. Brandon states that the discovery of the ammunition clip, while harmless without a firearm, served as a necessary catalyst to heighten security awareness among airport employees ahead of the Thanksgiving holiday season, potentially thwarting a larger threat.

ECONOMIC FORECASTS AND MORTGAGES: Brandon addresses the recent passage of a budget in the House and transitions into discussing a vision regarding a 50-year mortgage. Brandon describes seeing a green arrow going up, signaling a coming housing and mortgage boom around January or the beginning of the year. Brandon also mentions seeing transparent houses in this vision.

NATIONAL SECURITY THREATS AND INFILTRATIONS: Brandon references an interview where General Flynn warns of a major attack against America within 90 days, aligning with Brandon's own timeline extending to the 4th of July. Brandon recounts a vision of many small 9/11-style events coordinated by a thousand trained foreign operatives infiltrated into the country. Brandon specifies that these men are spread across ten cities, with 100 men per city, divided into groups of two or three per town, explicitly noting that three operatives were deployed to Honolulu.

HIGH-RISE REAL ESTATE ANOMALIES: Brandon points out specific anomalies regarding the 40th and 41st floors of a tower associated with Donald Trump, who resides on the 57th floor. Brandon mentions that the 41st floor, currently listed for $10 million, was previously occupied by a Brazilian man who died in July. Brandon urges careful attention to these specific floors and the empty apartment complex.

JUDICIAL BRANCH AND SUPREME COURT: Brandon discusses Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett, referring to a vision comparing her to Caiaphas. Brandon details seeing deep anger and bitterness in her heart stemming from hidden knowledge related to her position, mentioning the Epstein files as an example of such concealed information. Brandon emphasizes the need to pray for judges at all levels through 2026, 2027, and 2028 to ensure decisions are based on the Constitution rather than political affiliations.

POLITICAL SCANDALS AND FUTURE ELECTIONS: Brandon shares a vision concerning JD Vance and a modern-day Watergate scenario driven by pressure. Brandon describes a strategic, wealthy, and influential man turning into an informant under duress. Brandon also visualizes a grapefruit-sized oozing infection symbolizing a scandal, an attempted impeachment related to a 2028 presidential run, an African-American man with chubby cheeks, and the Secretary of State. Furthermore, Brandon warns of a demonically empowered, highly articulate individual being groomed behind closed doors to emerge as a far-left political figure, drawing parallels to historical moral scandals involving JFK, Marilyn Monroe, and Monica Lewinsky.

NATIONAL TURNAROUND AND BIBLICAL PROPHECIES: Brandon recounts a vision experienced while driving near Oral Roberts University, where a plane taking off symbolized a rapid, high-G-force turnaround for America, contrasting with the slow turning of a cruise ship. Brandon also references Matthew 24, reiterating that the beginning of sorrows includes multiple plagues, pestilences, earthquakes, and wars.

MIDDLE EAST POLITICS AND GLOBAL ALLIANCES: Brandon details a vision concerning Israel where one political figure is removed and another, specifically Gantz, is reinstated. Brandon compares one of the figures to the biblical King Saul, citing disobedience and consulting soothsayers, which will lead to an acceleration of end-times events and the third temple. Additionally, Brandon discusses Venezuela, predicting the end of its dictatorship and the rise of a Christian government. Brandon links Venezuela's oil and agriculture to the strengthening of BRICS nations, including Russia, China, North Korea, Iran, and Cuba, aiming to destabilize the US dollar and introduce CBDCs.

CHURCH LEADERSHIP AND PROPHETIC MINISTRY: Brandon warns of a shaking in the church, citing 1 Corinthians 5:5, where current megachurch leaders will face severe trials or removal due to pride and a lack of urgency regarding the end times. Brandon states that 2025 is a year of grace, but 2026 will bring manifestations of a new remnant of true prophetic voices. Brandon describes this upcoming generation walking in unprecedented signs, wonders, healings, and words of knowledge, comparing the increase in spiritual power to a shift from 110-volt to 220-volt electricity.

TARGETED WARNINGS FOR PUBLIC FIGURES: Brandon issues specific warnings for several public figures. Brandon cautions that Donald Trump must be vigilant against poisoning attempts via food or drink, especially during foreign travel or while playing golf, advising him to consume only bottled water. Brandon foresees the wealth of Eric and Don Jr. doubling or tripling. Brandon also warns Candace Owens that she is approaching a dangerous conspiracy rabbit hole involving a computer or email, noting that Alex Jones deliberately avoids this specific topic. Brandon urges Owens to yield to God for a significant future role in politics, possibly a Senate or Congress seat. Lastly, Brandon mentions an impending severe storm for Erica, Charlie's widow.
rawData: [November 13, 2025]-[We have some things to pray about]-[https://youtu.be/NliWml7zW00]-[All right, let's get started. Good morning, evening, or wherever you are. Good morning, family. It's almost morning. We're going to go over some things that we saw yesterday in prayer, and we just want to give God all the glory for what he does on this channel. I told Diana while we were talking today that we have one of the largest prayer gatherings in the world as far as coming on and praying and having a channel for prayer. We have one of the largest, if not the largest, prayer channels in the world, and that is consistent. People pray all the time, but isn't Jesus wonderful for what he has done on here? I just give all the glory to Jesus. I said, 'Lord, that we would make your name great.' Father, I am just telling the people that you're coming. It is exciting to see what you're doing on this channel. But I want to go over some things. Braden, isn't it amazing that we had Atlanta today on the news concerning the airport? Baby, could you read that? 'Terror aboard Frontier flight as loaded gun magazine is found near seat as it prepared to depart Atlanta airport.' I said the Atlanta airport is highlighted to me now. Is that what I was shown? No. Is this a coincidence? No. God works in mysterious ways, they always say. But what if that one incident of us praying even last night causes them to get—I don't want to say fired, as someone might have lost their job over that—but it got enough attention from the media to say, 'Listen, you all need to be paying attention even more so during this Thanksgiving.' It only takes a few people because people can become laxadaisical in their job after doing something for so long. All it takes is a little bit to get their attention. What if this was the attention that was needed for them to start doing their job more effectively to catch what we're praying about regarding Atlanta? I said, 'Lord, that coincidence.' It wasn't Miami; it wasn't New York; it was Atlanta. Diana and the staff were like, 'We've got to go over things; we've got to talk about this. We don't know how we missed this. This is a big mishap, a gun ammo clip, and all this stuff. We have to make sure security is tighter.' And I thought, 'Isn't Jesus wonderful?' I know that he works, and I see his hand in this. No one was hurt or injured. A gun clip is harmless without the firearm, but it's enough to raise awareness to make them super attentive to their jobs for this Thanksgiving holiday season because those employees, I guarantee you, will be thinking, 'I don't want to get in trouble or fired if we let something like this happen again.' I thought, 'Wow, Diana, that cannot be a coincidence.' So I just give all the glory to God for that. One of the major city airports the Lord highlighted to me was Atlanta. He said, 'Pray over Atlanta. This is a hot spot.' And when it happened today, people were saying, 'Braden, is this the hot spot? Is this what you saw?' I'm like, 'No, it's much worse. What the Lord showed me was a catastrophic event.' But God, prayer changes things. I believe this is a result of prayer working on our behalf already. Don't put God in a box. You might think they're going to apprehend a guy with a carry-on bag and a SWAT team, but maybe, just maybe, the heightened security would thwart, as I said the word, thwart the bad guy from wanting to do something even more so. We know they got the budget passed today in the House, and now it's off to the president's desk. Isn't Jesus wonderful? Another thing that happened—I'm not trying to attack the 50-year mark. I wasn't attacking President Trump. I'm for President Trump. I pray for him probably more than I've prayed for any president ever before in my life. I have interceded for this man because I know what he has to get done and what the Lord has shown me about his future and what he has to accomplish concerning the end times and the church. Could God use somebody else? Yes, but he has somebody that he can use right now. Regarding the 50-year mortgage, as much as my opinion is—after I saw how much the interest was—people say, 'Braden, it's affordable and it makes it where I can buy a house.' If that's your avenue and this happens, this is what I saw: a housing boom coming, a mortgage boom, a green arrow going up, and the houses were transparent. I believe it could be because of the timing. I saw it coming around January or the first of the year. Here we are at Thanksgiving, and we're talking about it. So for the people who want a 50-year mortgage, praise God. It's not my business. Look at that graph. If that's what you're believing God for, I'm believing that you'll be debt-free. I'm believing God that you'll owe no man anything but to love him. I believe that the Bible says that a seed produces after its own kind. Whatsoever man soweth, that will he also reap. I believe that you won't have to have a 50-year mortgage, that you'll be the lender unto many and you shall not borrow. That's just what I believe. But you have to let people be where their faith is. If their faith is at a 50-year mortgage, you can't knock them. Everybody's been dealt a measure of faith, but how you exercise and grow it is up to you every single day. I'm not knocking anybody because I've been there. But looking at 50 years is a long time. I don't even know if I'll be alive; I had to do the math. Anyway, going over the vision—was there anything else you want to show in the news, baby? Oh, I want you to see this video my son found. This is General Flynn. We met General Flynn at Clay Clark's event. I want to show you what he says about what he believes we're about to see. I don't believe he watches my channel, but he is saying what the spirit of God is saying—what I'm warning you about—regarding a major attack against America. And to pray. This is why we're here. So, I want you to play this, Braden, a little bit and let them hear what General Flynn said. He's on the inside. He knows. He hears the chatter—that's what I'm trying to say. So, that was an amazing interview, by the way. I would encourage everybody—I get into stuff like that when Braden finds stuff because whenever it's going along with what the Lord has told me, I go, 'You know, you don't want to be flaky.' There's so much of what the Lord shows me on a consecutive basis that when Braden finds me stuff like that, he goes, 'Daddy, this will encourage you that what the Lord is telling you and what you're praying about all the time in the car driving around and praying in the house when I hear you praying—Daddy, other people are saying this, and they're not in your prayer chain. These are people that are in the world.' And I don't know if General Flynn knows Jesus Christ or not. I pray he does. But it's interesting when a man of his caliber goes on Alex Jones and warns the nation that he believes in 90 days. Was it 90 days? No, he said 40 days. 39 days. 90. It was 90. Okay. Within 90 days. Within 90 days was the same time frame the Lord said, all the way going into the 4th of July. Praying into this time frame as I was seeing, and people said, 'Brendon, did you say many 9/11s?' I said, 'Many with a Y.' No, small but many of them. They're small but many is what I saw. Like a bunch, but many, like small. Does that make sense? Many, many, many. It was a play on words, I guess. But many, many 9/11s. This is where I saw a thousand men that were operatives from a country, not terrorists, an actual group of men that were trained people that were here and infiltrated. And that's why I tried to—a thousand of them. And I've said it: 10 cities. 10 cities over and over again. 100 men per city spread out into towns. Two men per town. Some of those towns were bigger; they had three. And they spread the people out. And the Lord said they even, as a flex, went into Honolulu with three men. And I saw three men specifically. And you know what? I thought it was interesting because, you know, we are researchers. I always say 'we'—I don't pull my toe—and it's Braden and Diana who are researchers, and I depend on them for so much. And they said—who was it, you or Braden?—they said, 'I found the 41st floor.' Who lives on the 41st floor? There's mama 404. He died in July in the tower. He passed away in July. The man that lived on the 41st floor passed away in July. He's not even here no more. The 40th floor is occupied, but they won't tell you. The 41st floor is for sale for $10 million. $10 million. I thought that's kind of interesting. He passed away in July, and he was Brazilian and he was a con man from what I've understood. Right. He got in trouble. I don't know. He was indicted. Something happened. I don't know. Don't quote me on it. I'm not trying to defame anybody; I just thought it was something that he was in trouble with. But the 41st floor is no longer, and it's 10 million bucks, and that's the floor of the Lord. So pay attention to the 41st and 40th floor. So they did research. Who's on the 40th floor? What is it? Trump's on the 57th from what I understood. So he's on up, because the Lord said, 'Pay attention to his towers. Pay attention to these things.' So why would it be an empty apartment complex that the Lord said to pay attention to? I don't know. But I know I hear the Lord, and I know he said specifically to pay attention to that floor. So we pay attention to that floor just like he said, 'Pay attention to Atlanta.' Pay attention to these things that I tell you, and you intercede. Now we're going to go on. Amy Coney. Amy Coney. Yeah. Coney Barrett. The Supreme Court. The Lord called her a Caiaphas. And he said Caiaphas—which I didn't know what I'm telling y'all, sorry, but I didn't know. I was like, 'What is it?' So we start... he was the one that betrayed Jesus. He was the one that was the head Pharisee that went after Jesus. The head Pharisee. High priest. The high priest. So the Lord's saying that the same type of shadow is... Trump, Jesus? No, that's not what the Lord was saying. He said, 'I saw deep anger in her heart toward him.' And the Lord God help me, I can't say—I don't want to say certain things again tonight. But he said there was deep anger in her heart because of things she knew that no one else knew because of her position. And that's whenever I try to say not everybody always comes out squeaky clean in life, right? They know the Epstein files. They know a lot of things. I'm sure they know a lot of things. And I'm not saying Trump's in the Epstein file—I'm not going to get involved in all that. But there's something there with her heart, why she has turned so sour. And the Lord said to me, 'Pray for her heart.' Not her physical heart, but her heart toward the circumstances. She's bitter. She's gotten angry. She knows something, but there's something more there. Her face changed. Hardness set in. What is this? What does she know that we don't know? And I was praying over her to make decisions for what we want in the days ahead, that she would not have a political opinion, that it would be a constitutional opinion. You know, we don't want any judge going with Democrat or Republican. We want them to go with what the Constitution says, what the law of the land says, and make good godly decisions concerning the law. If they go with the Republicans next time—if they're Democrats, then they'll go—but we like it when they're conservative because it goes with what we believe, which is that the Bible is the law. We want them going with the Word of God. You know, let's go with what the Bible says every time. But usually conservatives do that. But I was seeing that we need to pray concerning the judges going into 2026. And the Lord said this will be all the way through 2026, 2027, and 2028. We must pray for the judges. Not just the big judges like them, but all the other judges. They'll really try to come against Trump and the decisions he'll make in the days ahead. So, as I was praying over JD Vance and what I heard, the Lord said, 'You're seeing ahead of time. You're seeing in the future. It has not happened yet.' I said, 'Watergate, Watergate, what is this?' So I prayed into that all afternoon. And I said, 'Lord, what is the Watergate with JD Vance? What is this?' And he said, 'Brandon, I show you a glimpse of that which is to come. Pray for this. Pray. We don't want another Watergate, a modern-day Watergate.' And he said, 'Pray into this.' And I saw key strategic people that were involved in this. And when it comes out, they say, 'I was forced to because of his position.' Is that a way to say it? 'I didn't want to do it, but because of his position, I felt like I had to. I did this on behalf of him, not wanting to.' And I saw the strategic man who has a lot of influence with a lot of money become a rat. Not that that was ever supposed to take place because what he did was wrong. But the motive behind it was pressure. So we pray for the pressure. We pray for why the man would ask the other man to do this certain thing, why these other things would try to take place. And the Lord said, 'You're looking into the not-too-distant future.' And I said, 'Can we stop this then?' Of course you can. Of course you can. You were to pray. And the infection that was the size of a grapefruit that was right above his side... it was oozing out with infection. And the Lord said, 'Scandal, scandal.' Remember? And I saw a strategic knife cutting it and letting the drainage out. But because of what he was trying to do with running for the President of the United States of America in 2028, I heard, 'Impeach, impeach, impeach,' but they didn't have enough votes to impeach him, to go after him even further, to do all these things. But it was enough to keep him out of being what he was, what the presidency and the things was. People didn't want to touch it, right? I saw the African-American man with chubby cheeks. And the Secretary of State, I saw these people running behind, but the Lord said specifically, "You're not paying attention to what you need to be paying attention to, for they're grooming a new Obama kind of a person behind the closed doors. They're grooming somebody and they haven't come on the scene yet." I saw a person that had great speaking ability, and the Lord said they will be demonically—I don't want to call them possessed. You know how you have an anointing by the Spirit of God to do things? We can lay hands on the sick and we see them recover, but it's not you that does it. It's the Holy Ghost in you, right? There's a demonic anointing on people to do certain things like equipping. Equipping, that's a good word. Thanks. An equipping to get the job done by far leftist, right-thinking. And it was a demonic anointing. I hate to use "anointing" because that's not—I don't like—how would that word be? It's not anointing because that's what we have. It's an ability. It's a demonic ability like Superman. I don't know what else to say, y'all, because it's definitely anointing. We walk in anointing. It's a demonic presence. An endowment. Is that a good word? Yeah. I think—I don't know—I'm not very good. I'm trying. No. So you'll get my point. But it made, like what you would see operating, an operation of them—they were empowered. They were demonically empowered. Yeah. So there you go. You can edit all that out. It makes me sound like a weirdo. It's live, but I'm doing the best I can with my words. They were empowered. Thank you. They were empowered by darkness. And I saw this person being like an Obama with their speech, and they were luring you in similar to how music does in the secular realm. And this person was being groomed, and the Lord said, "You're not paying attention to the right thing." So, a demonic empowerment, an influence driven by it. So I saw that, and then I saw moral scandal. And then I saw Monica Lewinsky. I saw Marilyn Monroe. I heard the word JFK. I heard JFK, Marilyn Monroe, and then I heard Monica Lewinsky. And then I heard another scandal. And that's what I was praying over again today. And people say, "Brandon, these are things that we can avert and we can stop as the body of Christ, to pray into these things." So, yeah, the Lord said, "Leave it there. Don't go anymore." So that's what we're going to do. So that's what we're going to pray over. And we'll pray over the nation. We pray over the covering over this nation. And regardless of whoever are the people that are involved in this that the Lord is trying to protect, we pray over who God wants in power, and regardless of people messing it up through their flesh, right? We want the right person to get the job done. Now, as I was seeing the budget be passed, I saw a plane take off, and the Lord said, "Today's the day of the beginning of the turnaround. Pray into that." Now, this is what I saw: I saw the plane taking off. And I was at Oral Roberts University. We were driving over there today, and I was driving down the hill going to ORU, and I saw the airport by ORU, and I saw the plane taking off, and the Lord said, "This is the beginning of a turnaround." As I was watching the clouds, I saw this, and I said, "This is the beginning of a turnaround. Pray into that for the nation." And that was why the cruise ship was behind you, because I told Braden, "This is the beginning of the turn." But see, a boat takes a long time to turn around. It doesn't happen all at once. A plane can really put some G-force and really change things really fast. But that big boat behind me, it takes a little bit. You see that boat? I'll get down there; you can see that boat. That boat takes a little bit. And the Lord said, "Start praying into that. America's in trouble, y'all. And I know a lot of people say you're not going to experience all this. And, you know, I understand why you say it, because you say it out of fear. A lot of times, and you're in faith, you say, but a lot of it's based out of a seed of fear—worried about the plague, worried about things. You're elderly, a lot of you, and you don't want to die from a plague. I didn't say we would if you use the scripture. Well, I believe it never will happen. Well, you're standing against the Word. Matthew 24 said it would. Jesus said it would. It came right out of His own mouth. He warned us that we would see these things. And we're not going to contradict what God Himself, Jesus in the flesh, said we were going to experience: wars. These are the signs, because the disciples asked Him, "What are the signs of Your coming, Master?" Well, let me tell you, there'll be wars and rumors of wars. There'll be plagues and pestilences. There'll be earthquakes in diverse places. But—I don't want to misquote it—"Fear not, but this is the beginning of sorrows." And He warned us that this stuff was going to take place. So we've had, He said, plural, more than one plague. He didn't say one, "We're going to have COVID." It's not what He said. You'll have earthquakes. You'll have wars and rumors of wars. You'll have plagues. You'll have pestilences. You'll have these things. He didn't say one. So what does that tell you? If we are in the beginning of sorrows, if we really are there, we're going to see these things. So what does that mean for the body of Christ? That means you need to know who you are. Either you have a backbone like a crowbar or you don't. And that's why the Lord said, "Rally the troops, wake people up. Call them. Call to prayer. Be consistent. Be instant in season and out of season. Pray. I need you to be serious about this and do this for me." And I've done it; I'm doing the best I can. And I tell you what the Lord tells us to say. So then the other part was praying over what I saw concerning Israel. I saw, pretty much you would know who it was, Bibi. And I saw Gantz come back. Everybody thought I was talking about Bill Clinton—or, not Bill Clinton, George Bush—or any of these others, or Obama coming back. I'm not talking about America. I was talking about Israel, and the Lord showed me that the one man would be taken out and the other one put back in. And I heard a word, and when I heard the word, I didn't know what I was hearing. And when I said it, I wish I never would have said it because I was like, "Oh my God, Brandon, pull those words back." It's not something you want to say on live. So those words don't exist on there anymore. So, you know, when you're seeing these things and you're releasing things so quickly, and then you find out what it means when you talk to people of intelligence, you go, "Oh, dear God, I've got to pray." Okay, we should pray more; this is very serious. So the Lord said he was like Saul. The Lord said he was like Saul. There were things that He had asked him to do that he was disobedient in. Saul was disobedient by not killing all the kings and doing what He had asked him to do. He didn't obey, and he started talking to soothsayers. He started doing things that were very bad, and he got possessed with a demonic spirit. Think about that. He opened the door. But I saw a door open, and then I saw that man removed. And the Lord said what's about to happen will be an acceleration of the end times. I saw an acceleration of the end times—third temple. But this will be a pressure on the end times, an acceleration. Does that make sense, what I'm trying to tell y'all? And I know there's probably people that really get ticked off about what I just said, especially in my circle, but that's what I saw. It's not something that bothered me a lot, but people said, "Brandon, it's heavy what you say. You look like you're really tired. Are you going through something?" Have you ever brought something like that on the internet to 150,000 or a million people and told them something that heavy when he has family, and said all this that I'm seeing? I thank God he did. I didn't say who the pastors were that I saw. According to 1 Corinthians 5:5, the Lord gave me that and said this would begin. He said, "I've given the year of 2025 of great grace going into this timeframe, Brandon," but he said the cup of it is full before Him and He's handing this over. It's not me doing it, but it's going to be so that they do not basically burn in hell because of disobedience. People said, "What about grace, Brandon? What about all this?" I'm not God. I'm not here to judge anybody. I'm here to tell you what I've heard. And the Lord said, "To much is given, much is required." With great power comes great responsibility. That's from Spider-Man, but you can quote it for God, too. Do you understand? The Lord said to me, "We're out of time, Brandon. And they're not telling My people that I'm coming, and I'm holding them accountable for it." A great shaking will take place in the church. As I see all this stuff, it's heavy. So, if I have a heavy countenance, this is heavy because I saw the men, I know who they are, and I saw what was going to happen. I know specific events that will take place in each one of their lives, and I was not allowed to tell you all, but I saw hard days for some folks. Some of them I know, and it would make me weep. I told Diana, "You know, whenever He comes and talks to me and He visits and He says these things to me and I see it all, you carry it a little bit because you carry His heart." People are stiff-necked and God's got to get your attention because your head is in the clouds and you ignore Him. He's yelling as loud as He can to the point where now you just go, 'Well, you know, I'll do what I want to do because I have a platform. I have money. I have this and that.' But He gave it all to you. It's all about making His name great. The money, the fame, the platform—whatever you may have—it was all given to you by Him for His glory. But most took it as if it was them. And that's what the Lord was saying to me: "To much is given, much is required." And some will depart this earth, but the younger ones won't. They're going to go through a trial. Some of them have huge platforms, but they'll go through a trial. Maybe their wife will go home. But it was very heavy—heavy stuff that He gives me. I pray over it and I say, "Lord," and He said, "I'm not out of mercy. I'm out of time. We're out of time. Jesus is coming." And there's a generation that doesn't know. All these young people, if I come back, they're all going to hell. Do you understand? There's a bunch of people that do not know Me. Millions, billions do not know Me. And yet it's still status quo: 30-minute sermon, offering, rock and roll music, whatever. You send people on their way, but there's no urgency to tell them that My Son's return is at hand. Maybe it's a watered-down, poor sermon, and that's the megachurch. The Lord told me, "Those days are done." And He said, "You'll see the manifestation of it even more in 2026." Now, when I'm talking about the fine line and He shows me all these things, you're going to see the glory to the remnant, the people that are awake. You're going to see people start walking in miracles like you wouldn't believe. It's going to be a shaking. People are going to see it and go, "What is going on?" And that's what He said. There will be people that walk in the prophetic that will have an overshadowing of Me like the men of the Bible, and they will speak things and they will appear before their face because it would be God inside superimposed. It was like an overshadowing—whatever you speak, your words come to life, and they will not return unto Me void, but they will accomplish whereto I sent them. The Lord said, "These words will manifest. You will watch over your words." So I will overshadow the prophetic, and true prophetic voices will rise up. A lot of the chicanery and a lot of stuff you see around is nonsense; it will fade away. But a true manifestation of the prophetic voice will rise up with signs, wonders, healings, demonstrations, and manifestations of the glory of God. He said, "You will see prophetic like you've never seen it in this generation." Words will be heavy. Words will have great impact because it's God-inspired, like an overshadowing. I don't know how else to explain it, but He said this generation has never seen this before. Be watchful over what you say. They'll have a mysteriousness and be reclusive. You'll be set apart. You won't be able to go amongst the people like that. You'll speak only what I tell you to speak into these crowds. I thought it was interesting, some of the faces I see that will walk in this, because He gives me certain ministers and He'll say, "There are a lot of people right now, Brandon, that you don't even know who they are. There are no names." But say only what the Spirit of the Lord says. I saw words of knowledge giftings like we've never seen before. People walking in words of knowledge. You say bold stuff on the internet because he tells you to do it. I say all to the glory of Jesus every time. If they try to do something, all to the glory of Jesus. My life and my wife's life are in his hands. We give all glory to Jesus, in this life and in the next, all to his glory. Saying all that to say this, we pray this video blessed you today and we'll see you again tomorrow. Remember, put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. We love you, Jesus loves you, and we'll see you again tomorrow. Bye-bye.]
